query:
UPDATE properties SET 
title = 'Mango Hills — Exclusive Resort Estate for Sale | Sam Roi Yot, Thailand',
description = 'Already generating 5-star Airbnb reviews and ranked in the top 5% of properties worldwide, Mango Hills is not just a home — it is a fully operational luxury retreat estate set inside a thriving 4-rai mango plantation in the heart of Sam Roi Yot National Park, just 1.5km from Dolphin Bay''s pristine beaches.

This is the rare property that pays for itself. The 120+ mango trees produce approximately 5 tons of fruit annually, generating passive harvest revenue or the foundation of an eco-tourism or wellness brand. The proven B&B setup supports 5–7%+ rental yields from holiday lets and long-term expat stays — the income infrastructure is already built and already working.

The Estate: The master bedroom suite (48 sqm) anchors the main residence alongside a fully equipped kitchen (36 sqm) and an expansive living and entertaining space. Two private bungalows (2 x 24 sqm) offer guests or rental guests complete independence. The treehouse (25 sqm) delivers something truly unforgettable — a private elevated retreat with sweeping mountain and sea views that no hotel in the region can match. The bar (24 sqm), sala (24 sqm), wood-fired pizza oven, BBQ area, and outdoor kitchen make this estate built for entertaining at the highest level. A repurposed container space (27 sqm) adds flexible use as a studio, office, or additional guest accommodation.

The Pool: A large saltwater pool sits at the heart of the estate, surrounded by the mango orchard — the kind of setting that stops people mid-scroll and fills a calendar with bookings.

The Land: 4 Rai 2 Ngan 40 sq.wah (~7,360 sqm / 1.8 acres) secured under Red Garuda Chanote title — Thailand''s highest legal land protection with precise boundaries and full ownership rights. Foreigner-friendly via leasehold or company setup.

The Location: Sam Roi Yot is Thailand''s most underrated coastal destination. Dramatic limestone karst mountains, untouched national park beaches, zero tourist crowds, and a growing European expat community — all just 40km south of Hua Hin''s international hospitals, golf courses, and amenities. This is where the discerning buyer comes before everyone else does.

This estate is ideal for:
- Retirees seeking a private income-generating paradise
- Remote workers wanting a luxury base with ROI
- Investors targeting boutique hospitality or eco-tourism
- Families wanting a private holiday compound that earns when you''re not there

Mango Hills is priced to move at €483,000. Properties of this scale, quality, and income potential at this price point do not exist anywhere else on the Gulf Coast of Thailand.'
WHERE id = 7
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3NdWH8UPMGqi4Cv.root --database ALw7Sd5LNhGKkw6UaBkkj7 --execute UPDATE properties SET
